## Title: Fix dead code and error handling in VCD tracer gui_thread

### Summary
The `gui_thread` function in the VCD tracer module contains unreachable code that masks error conditions. The function calls `gui_loop()`, which is a main event loop that only returns when a fatal error occurs. The subsequent `return NULL` statement is therefore dead code that is never executed under normal circumstances. More importantly, this silent return masks the fact that an error has occurred, making debuggin
